description: One reviewed, runnable component in the served catalog. An entry is derived from a component manifest plus registry-level review metadata; it never contains secrets or runner-local paths.

summary.description: One user-facing sentence for the slot dropdown.

imageDigest.description: Immutable resolved executor image digest pinned at review time; the manifest may name a tag, the catalog must not.

capabilities.description: Copied from the component manifest. Descriptive only; parser/OCR/VLM is expressed here (ocr, geometry, gpu), never as a separate entry type.

requirements.description: Copied from the component manifest (gpu, network, memory, connections).

connectionTypes.description: Connection types the component consumes (for example llm-api). Which concrete provider/model is used comes from the user's named connection, never from the catalog.

maturity.description: Experimental entries surface with a non-default flag; license-gated entries are visible but not runnable on the hosted service.

recommended.description: Preselected profile owner in the slot dropdown; at most one recommended entry per role and document class.

revision.description: Bumped whenever the resolved option patch changes; part of the candidate fingerprint.

optionsPatch.description: Reviewed option values applied over schema defaults. Must validate against the component's options schema.

reviewed.description: True only after the upstream code, model weights, and bundled assets were reviewed together.
